channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DOLATALGO] Dolat Algotech: NSE Clearing Levy Penalty of ₹1.18 Lakh
item.description:
Dolat Algotech Ltd has received a penalty of ₹1,18,000 from NSE Clearing Limited for TM/FPI Limit Violation. The penalty includes a basic fine of ₹1,00,000 plus GST of ₹18,000. The company stated that the penalty does not have a material impact on its financials, operations, or other activities, except for the monetary penalty levied.

  • Dolat Algotech received a penalty of ₹1,18,000 from NSE Clearing Limited.
  • The penalty is for TM/FPI Limit Violation.
  • The penalty includes a basic fine of ₹1,00,000 and GST of ₹18,000.
  • The company states the penalty will not have a material financial impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dolat Algotech Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [SRIGEE] Srigee Dlm Board Meeting on May 27, 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
Srigee Dlm Ltd has scheduled a Board meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 27, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Standalone audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, will be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post result declaration.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29(1) of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Srigee Dlm Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDOFARM] Indo Farm Equipment Board Meeting on May 21, 2026
item.description:
Indo Farm Equipment Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which was closed from April 1, 2026, will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indo Farm Equipment Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMAGI] Amagi Faces ₹17.9 Cr Income Tax Adjustment for AY 2023-24
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amagi Media Labs Ltd received an income tax assessment order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, pertaining to Assessment Year 2023-24. The Income Tax Department has categorized certain overseas entities as "resellers of IT products," leading to an adjustment of ₹17,91,09,474. Amagi contends that these entities are "IT service providers" and plans to challenge the re-computation through an appeal. The company states that the financial impact is limited to the adjustment amount, with no impact on operational activities.

  • Income Tax Department order results in ₹17.9 Cr adjustment for AY 2023-24.
  • Amagi to appeal the order, disputing entity classification.
  • The adjustment relates to transfer pricing on inter-company transactions.
  • Financial impact limited to the adjustment amount; no operational impact.
  • Order received on May 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [HESTERBIO] Hester Biosciences Recommends ₹11 Dividend; Priya Gandhi Re-appointed
item.description:
Hester Biosciences Ltd. has approved its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a dividend of ₹11 per equity share (110%) subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the re-appointment of Ms. Priya Gandhi as Executive Director for three years starting October 28, 2026, also subject to member approval. Chandulal M. Shah & Co., Statutory Auditors, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results. The board meeting concluded at 11:28 a.m. (IST).

  • Hester Biosciences recommends a dividend of ₹11 per equity share (110%) for FY26.
  • Priya Gandhi re-appointed as Executive Director for 3 years, effective October 28, 2026.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Auditors Chandulal M. Shah & Co. issued an unmodified opinion on FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HESTER BIOSCIENCES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SWOEF] Swojas Foods Board Meeting on 22 May 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
Swojas Foods Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will open 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 22, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Trading window to open 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • Meeting will also address any other matter with board permission.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SWOJAS ENERGY FOODS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OASIS] Oasis Tradelink Board Meeting on May 19, 2026
item.description:
Oasis Tradelink Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 19, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 19, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and year ended March 31, 2026 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours post results announcement.
  • Meeting to be held at U-23, Narmada Complex, Bharuch.

Company: Oasis Tradelink Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SUNDARAM] Sundaram Multi Pap Board Meeting on May 25, 2026
item.description:
Sundaram Multi Pap Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 25, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in Mumbai. The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 25, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited Standalone Financial Results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Mumbai.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNDARAM MULTI PAP LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NATCOPHARM] Natco Pharma: Receives ₹4.92 Cr Demand Notice from NPPA
item.description:
Natco Pharma Ltd has received a demand notice dated May 12, 2026, from the National Pharmaceutical Pricing Authority (NPPA) for ₹4,92,25,923. The notice alleges overcharging for two drugs between April and November 2023. Natco Pharma reported that there is no material impact on the company's financial or operational activities. The company cited technical issues for the delay in disclosing the information.

  • Natco Pharma received a demand notice from NPPA for ₹4.92 Cr.
  • The demand notice alleges overcharging for two drugs from April-Nov 2023.
  • Natco Pharma states no material financial or operational impact.
  • Delay in disclosure was due to technical issues/procedural delay.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATCO PHARMA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [KPIGREEN] KPI Green Energy Appoints Rajesh Shrivastava as Whole Time Director
item.description:
KPI Green Energy Ltd. has appointed Mr. Rajesh Shrivastava (DIN: 08757239) as Additional Director and Whole Time Director for five years effective May 15, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The company also re-appointed Mrs. Venu Birappa (DIN: 09123017) as Independent Director for a second term of five years starting August 3, 2026. Mr. Shrivastava brings 37 years of experience in power, infrastructure, and renewable energy sectors.

  • Rajesh Shrivastava appointed as Additional Director and Whole Time Director effective May 15, 2026.
  • Venu Birappa re-appointed as Independent Director for a second term from August 3, 2026.
  • Shrivastava has nearly 37 years of experience in the energy and infrastructure sectors.
  • Board meeting on May 15, 2026, approved the appointments based on Nomination and Remuneration Committee recommendation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPI Green Energy Ltd | Category: Management Change
